segments.text: They didn't switch out, so those Peach rapid jabs were inescapable—down to one stock!
segments.original_text: 変えてくれないのでこのパー弱弱ダンク耐えるはずもなく本体だけになってしまった

segments.text: There's the down tilt ready for that roll getup!
segments.original_text: さあ回避上がりに対応した下強

full_text: They didn't switch out, so those Peach rapid jabs were inescapable—down to one stock! There's the down tilt ready for that roll getup!

corrections.original: さあ回帰上がりに対応した下凶器
corrections.corrected: さあ回避上がりに対応した下強
corrections.rule: Kanji homophone: 回帰→回避; 下凶器→下強
